143: fibonacci :: Int -> Integer
144: fibonacci n
145:   | n < 0     = error "negative input"
146:   | n == 0    = 0
147:   | n == 1    = 1
148:   | otherwise = go n 0 1
149:   where
150:     go 0 a _ = a
151:     go k a b = go (k - 1) b (a + b)
